tasks.label: Marimo: Edit Active Notebook (Watch, micromamba)
args: eval "$(${workspaceFolder}/.local/bin/micromamba shell hook --shell bash 2>/dev/null || /home/dandroid/.local/bin/micromamba shell hook --shell bash)" && micromamba activate ${workspaceFolder}/.micromamba/envs/crispr-al && marimo edit --watch "${file}"
